logs.heading: A0: Determining days count and starting Gmail sync

```json
        "The script takes 5-15 minutes, so I'll start it and then monitor it.",
        "After starting, I'll wait for completion by monitoring the debug log up to 10 times."
    ],

    "tool_name": "code_execution_tool",
    "tool_args": {
        "runtime": "terminal",
        "session": 0,
        "reset": false,
        "code": "python /a0/usr/skills/gmail/scripts/gmail_reader.py --days 3 &\necho \"Gmail sync started with DAYS=3 (Sunday)\"\n"
    }
}
```

thoughts: Today is 2026-03-29 which is a Sunday.
Based on the rules: Sunday -> DAYS=3.
I need to run the gmail_reader.py script with DAYS=3.
The script takes 5-15 minutes, so I'll start it and then monitor it.
After starting, I'll wait for completion by monitoring the debug log up to 10 times.
